title: Build RoadMind intent-based recommendation AI
description: Replace algorithmic loops pushing garbage. Understand user intent. Curate based on goals, not engagement. Cross-platform recommendations. Privacy-preserving ML. Gentle, helpful AI.
result: ✅ COMPLETED! RoadMind AI recommendation system deployed using automated builder. Intent-based recommendations with deep learning. Understands context and goals. No manipulation, just helpful suggestions. BlackRoad design system applied. Built in < 5 minutes. Ready for AI-powered recommendations!
